projects.name: Tech Lead - ACES (Dec 2024 - Present)
projects.description: Leading technical initiatives and coordinating cybersecurity workshops, coding bootcamps, and competitive programming events for 200+ computer science students. Managing technical resources, lab setups, and equipment for departmental events and Hackathons.

projects.name: Cybersecurity Analyst Intern - ElevateLabs (May 2025 - July 2025)
projects.description: Performed vulnerability scans using Nessus and OpenVAS. Captured and analyzed live network traffic using Wireshark and tcpdump to identify anomalies. Executed penetration testing tasks including reconnaissance, enumeration, and exploitation phases using Kali Linux.

projects.name: Open Source Contributor - SSOC (May 2024)
projects.description: Participated in open source development program focusing on C++ and C programming projects (memory allocation bug fixtures). Collaborated with international developers on analytical problem-solving.

projects.name: Team Lead - Tech Fest Dhishna (Feb 2024)
projects.description: Led the organization and coordination for one of the largest inter-college tech events in Kerala.

projects.name: Bug Bounty Hunter (Dec 2025)
projects.description: Built an automated reconnaissance platform combining deterministic security checks (SQLi, XSS) with an LLM Logic Analyzer (Gemini) to detect complex business logic flaws. Implemented specialized agents for Subdomain Discovery and Endpoint Mapping. Developed an automated PoC Generator that produces validated exploit scripts.

projects.name: ARGUS - PPE Detection System (Feb 2024)
projects.description: Built a real-time PPE detection system using computer vision to detect safety gear violations for worker surveillance. Presented and approved by BPCL and HP. Integrated with a web-app and notification system for real-time alerts.

projects.name: DataBot - Natural Language Database Access (2024)
projects.description: Built a tool to query and manage databases using natural language prompts via Gemini LLM.

projects.name: Local Lab for SIEM & Pentesting (2024)
projects.description: Setup offline lab for Pentesting Vulnerable machines, WAZUH for SIEM, platforms like Vulnhub. Performed log analysis using Wazuh, traffic capture and analysis using Wireshark for DNS, TCP/IP, and HTTP protocols.

projects.name: 12x Streak State and National Hackathon Winner
projects.description: Consistently placed and won in multiple state and national level hackathons.

projects.name: Winner - Code reCET, CET Trivandrum
projects.description: Won the Code reCET hackathon for the ARGUS Project (PPE Detection System).

projects.name: Make-a-ton 7.0 ''Change Maker'' track winner
projects.description: Organised by MLH. Won the Change Maker track.

projects.name: Other Notable Wins
projects.description: Winner - INKRIT 2.0, 3.0 (MES College Aluva), Winner - HACKnTech (BMCE College Ernakulam) for VR classroom project.
